title: Stellaris® RNA FISH  Protocol for Adherent Cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"jpf","text":"A set of Stellaris FISH Probes comprises up to 48 singly labeled oligonucleotides designed to selectively bind to targeted transcripts. Stellaris FISH Probes bound to target RNA produce fluorescent signals that permit detection of single RNA molecules as diffraction-limited spots by conventional fluorescence microscopy. See the Biosearch website for additional details.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"cavu8","text":"General Protocol \u0026 Storage ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"s51n","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3i2g5","text":"Product Description ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e7crf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9e8ii","text":"A set of Stellaris RNA FISH Probes is comprised of up to 48 singly labeled oligonucleotides designed to selectively bind to targeted transcripts. Stellaris RNA FISH Probes bound to target RNA produce fluorescent signals that permit detection of single RNA molecules as diffraction-limited spots by conventional fluorescence microscopy. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e9fe","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9mcoj","text":"STORAGE GUIDELINES","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"hbnm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dim98","text":"Stellaris RNA FISH Probes ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4ko8r","text":"Stellaris RNA FISH Probes are shipped dry and can be stored at +2 to +8 °C in this state. Dissolved probe mix should be subjected to a minimum number of freeze-thaw cycles. For daily and short-term use of dissolved probe mix, storage at +2 to +8 °C in the dark for up to a month is recommended. For storage lasting longer than a month, we recommend aliquoting and freezing probes in the dark at -15 to -30 °C. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"agju0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2ivc8","text":"Stellaris RNA FISH Hybridization Buffer ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fq78e","text":"Stellaris RNA FISH Hybridization Buffer should be stored at +2 to +8 °C for short-term and long-term use. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"befjo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eq41h","text":"Stellaris RNA FISH Wash Buffer A and Wash Buffer B ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dcu01","text":"Stellaris RNA FISH Wash Buffers A and B should be stored at room temperature for short-term and long-term use. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8bmp6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7r5o4","text":"REAGENTS and and Consumables: ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"brev2","text":"a) 18 mm round #1 coverglass ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"340kj","text":"b) 12-well culture plates ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1i8p3","text":"c) TE buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl, 1 mM EDTA, pH 8.0) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5rrge","text":"d) 37% Formaldehyde Solution ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6nvjr","text":"e) 10X Phosphate Buffered Saline (PBS), RNase-free ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6tsp0","text":"f) Nuclease-free water ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"80u7e","text":"g) Deionized Formamide ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"86d01","text":"h) Ethanol for molecular biology ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ar380","text":"i) Stellaris RNA FISH Hybridization Buffer (Biosearch Technologies Cat# SMF-HB1-10) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"64pns","text":"l) RNase-free consumables such as pipette tips ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"28iha","text":"m) 4’,6-diamidino-2-phenylindole (DAPI) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"56ttt","text":"n) Vectashield® Mounting Medium (Vector Laboratories Cat #H-1000) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a3pdq","text":"o) Humidified chamber (or equivalent): 150 mm tissue culture plate; bottom lined evenly with a flat water-saturated paper towel and a single layer of Parafilm® placed on top of the paper towel ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4p1r4","text":"p) 37 °C laboratory oven ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6jvqt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5b9je","text":"Microscope: ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cgnp","text":"a) Wide-field fluorescence microscope (e.g., Nikon Eclipse Ti or equivalent). We provide limited support for confocal applications. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7chsk","text":"b) A high numerical aperture (\u003e1.3) and 60-100x oil-immersion objective. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1dlo4","text":"c) Strong light source, such as a mercury or metal-halide lamp (Xenon or LED are typically not bright enough). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5ddrp","text":"d) Filter sets appropriate for the fluorophores. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"inhq","text":"e) Standard cooled CCD camera, ideally optimized for low-light level imaging rather than speed (13 μm pixel size or less is ideal). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cae1j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2fasc","text":"PREPARATION of REAGENTS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5vig7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3h9ad","text":" NOTE: When performing Stellaris RNA FISH, it is imperative to limit RNA degradation. Please ensure that all consumables and reagents are RNase-free. Recipes below are for set volumes. Please adjust accordingly. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dk4cb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"vljm","text":"Reconstituting the dried probe stock:","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":37}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5tce0","text":"ShipReady Probe Set (1 nmol):","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":29}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"vmkk","text":"A ShipReady probe set can provide up to 80 hybridizations. Re-dissolve the dried oligonucleotide probe blend in 80 μL of TE buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl, 1 mM EDTA, pH 8.0) to create a probe stock of 12.5 μM. Mix well by pipetting up and down, and then vortex and centrifuge briefly. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fbd7j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1aru9","text":"DesignReady or Custom Probe Set (5 nmol):","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":41}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"58bvs","text":" A DesignReady or custom probe set can provide up to 400 hybridizations. Re-dissolve the dried oligonucleotide probe blend in 400 μL of TE buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl, 1 mM EDTA, pH 8.0) to create a probe stock of 12.5 μM. Mix well by pipetting up and down, and then vortex and centrifuge briefly. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3vs94","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"92t0v","text":"Fixation steps: Grow cells on 18 mm round #1 coverglass in a 12-well cell culture plate.
Aspirate growth medium, and wash with 1 mL of 1X PBS. undetermined
Add 1 mL of fixation buffer. undetermined Stellaris® RNA FISH Fixation Buffer by Lgc Biosearch Technologies
Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes. 00:10:00
Wash with 1 mL of 1X PBS. undetermined
Wash again with 1 mL of 1X PBS. undetermined

To permeabilize, immerse cells in 1 mL of 70% (vol./vol.) ethanol for at least 1 hour at +2 to +8 °C. undetermined 01:00:00 Cells can be stored at +2 to +8 °C in 70% ethanol up to a week before hybridization.
If frozen before using, warm the reconstituted probe solution to room temperature. Mix well by vortexing, then centrifuge briefly.

To prepare the hybridization buffer containing probe, add 1 µL of probe stock solution to 100 µL of hybridization buffer, and then vortex and centrifuge, which is enough for one coverslip. This creates a working probe solution of 125 nM. This solution will be used in the steps below. Formamide is a teratogen that is easily absorbed through the skin and should be used in a chemical fume hood. Be sure to let the formamide and Hybridization Buffer warm to room temperature before opening the bottle. Do not freeze Hybridization Buffer.
Aspirate the 70% ethanol off the coverglass containing adherent cells within the 12-well plate.

Add 1 mL of Wash Buffer A (see recipe in guidelines), and incubate at room temperature for 2-5 minutes. undetermined 00:05:00 Stellaris® RNA FISH Wash Buffer A Biosearch Technologies Catalog #SMF-WA1-60

Assemble humidified chamber: 150 mm tissue culture plate; bottom lined evenly with a flat water-saturated paper towel and a single layer of Parafilm® placed on top of the paper towel. This chamber will help prevent evaporation of the probe solution from under the coverglass.
Within the humidified chamber, dispense 100 μL of the Hybridization Buffer containing probe onto the Parafilm.
Gently transfer the coverglass, cells side down, onto the 100 μL drop of hybridization buffer containing probe.
Cover the humidified chamber with the tissue culture lid, and seal with Parafilm.
Incubate in the dark at 37 °C for at least 4 hours. 04:00:00 Incubation can be continued up to 16 hours.
Gently transfer the coverglass, cells side up, to a fresh 12-well plate containing 1 mL of Wash Buffer A. undetermined Stellaris® RNA FISH Wash Buffer A Biosearch Technologies Catalog #SMF-WA1-60
Incubate in the dark at 37 °C for 30 minutes. 00:30:00
Aspirate the wash buffer, and then add 1 mL of DAPI nuclear stain (Wash Buffer A consisting of 5 ng/mL DAPI) to counterstain the nuclei.
Incubate in the dark at 37 °C for 30 minutes. 00:30:00

Aspirate the DAPI staining buffer, and then add 1 mL of Wash Buffer B. Incubate at room temperature for 2-5 minutes. undetermined 00:05:00 Stellaris® RNA FISH Wash Buffer B Biosearch Technologies Catalog #SMF-WB1-20

Add a small drop (approximately 15 µL) of Vectashield Mounting Medium onto a microscope slide, and mount coverglass onto the slide, cells side down. undetermined VECTASHIELD Mounting Medium Vector Laboratories Catalog #H-1000
Gently wick away excess anti-fade from the perimeter of the coverglass.
Seal the coverglass perimeter with clear nail polish, and allow to dry.
If necessary, gently wipe away any dried salt off the coverglass with water.
Proceed to imaging.
